channel.title: PC Game Archive (en)
channel.description: Latest PC games, indie releases, updates, and downloads.

item.title: Goetia 2
item.description: Goetia 2 is a gripping supernatural adventure game where players unravel dark mysteries in a hauntingly atmospheric world. Dive into a chilling narrative filled with puzzles, lore, and paranormal encounters.
item.content:encoded:
Goetia 2 is a gripping supernatural adventure game where players unravel dark mysteries in a hauntingly atmospheric world. Dive into a chilling narrative filled with puzzles, lore, and paranormal encounters.

Read more →

item.title: Technobabylon
item.description: Dive into Technobabylon, a gripping cyberpunk point-and-click adventure. Explore a dystopian future where AI and human lives intertwine, unraveling deep mysteries and moral dilemmas.
item.content:encoded:
Dive into Technobabylon, a gripping cyberpunk point-and-click adventure. Explore a dystopian future where AI and human lives intertwine, unraveling deep mysteries and moral dilemmas.

Read more →

item.title: Tales of the Neon Sea
item.description: Tales of the Neon Sea is a cyberpunk adventure game blending noir storytelling with puzzle-solving. Explore a dystopian city as a grizzled detective uncovering dark secrets in this pixel-art masterpiece.
item.content:encoded:
Tales of the Neon Sea is a cyberpunk adventure game blending noir storytelling with puzzle-solving. Explore a dystopian city as a grizzled detective uncovering dark secrets in this pixel-art masterpiece.

Read more →

item.title: Lumote: The Mastermote Chronicles
item.description: Lumote: The Mastermote Chronicles is a mesmerizing puzzle-exploration game set in a vibrant bioluminescent underwater world. Solve physics-based puzzles and uncover the mysteries of this unique ecosystem.
item.content:encoded:
Lumote: The Mastermote Chronicles is a mesmerizing puzzle-exploration game set in a vibrant bioluminescent underwater world. Solve physics-based puzzles and uncover the mysteries of this unique ecosystem.

Read more →

item.title: Sam & Max: Beyond Time and Space
item.description: Join Sam & Max: Beyond Time and Space, a hilarious point-and-click adventure game, as the Freelance Police duo tackles bizarre cases across time and dimensions. Packed with witty humor and quirky puzzles, this episodic classic is a must-play for fans of comedic storytelling.
item.content:encoded:
Join Sam & Max: Beyond Time and Space, a hilarious point-and-click adventure game, as the Freelance Police duo tackles bizarre cases across time and dimensions. Packed with witty humor and quirky puzzles, this episodic classic is a must-play for fans of comedic storytelling.

Read more →

item.title: Strangeland
item.description: Strangeland is a surreal point-and-click adventure game that plunges players into a twisted carnival of the mind. Solve cryptic puzzles, confront haunting visions, and uncover the truth in this psychological journey.
item.content:encoded:
Strangeland is a surreal point-and-click adventure game that plunges players into a twisted carnival of the mind. Solve cryptic puzzles, confront haunting visions, and uncover the truth in this psychological journey.

Read more →

item.title: Insurmountable
item.description: Insurmountable is a challenging roguelike survival game where you lead an expedition through procedurally generated mountain ranges. Make strategic decisions to overcome deadly obstacles and reach the summit against all odds.
item.content:encoded:
Insurmountable is a challenging roguelike survival game where you lead an expedition through procedurally generated mountain ranges. Make strategic decisions to overcome deadly obstacles and reach the summit against all odds.

Read more →

item.title: No Longer Home
item.description: No Longer Home is a poignant narrative adventure game about two non-binary students navigating adulthood, identity, and change in a shifting London apartment. A deeply personal indie experience.
item.content:encoded:
No Longer Home is a poignant narrative adventure game about two non-binary students navigating adulthood, identity, and change in a shifting London apartment. A deeply personal indie experience.

Read more →

item.title: Lost in Play
item.description: Lost in Play is a charming adventure puzzle game where siblings Toto and Gal embark on a whimsical journey through their imagination. Solve puzzles, meet quirky characters, and unravel a heartwarming story in this beautifully animated indie gem.
item.content:encoded:
Lost in Play is a charming adventure puzzle game where siblings Toto and Gal embark on a whimsical journey through their imagination. Solve puzzles, meet quirky characters, and unravel a heartwarming story in this beautifully animated indie gem.

Read more →

item.title: Eastward
item.description: Eastward is a captivating action-adventure RPG with stunning pixel art. Explore a dystopian world, uncover secrets, and embark on an emotional journey with John and Sam in this story-driven single-player experience.
item.content:encoded:
Eastward is a captivating action-adventure RPG with stunning pixel art. Explore a dystopian world, uncover secrets, and embark on an emotional journey with John and Sam in this story-driven single-player experience.

Read more →

item.title: Scrapnaut
item.description: Scrapnaut is a survival crafting game set in a post-apocalyptic world. Build, farm, and defend your base while exploring a vast open world filled with resources, dangers, and mysteries.
item.content:encoded:
Scrapnaut is a survival crafting game set in a post-apocalyptic world. Build, farm, and defend your base while exploring a vast open world filled with resources, dangers, and mysteries.

Read more →

item.title: Nox Archaist
item.description: Nox Archaist is a retro-inspired RPG for fans of classic Apple II games. Explore a pixelated fantasy world filled with turn-based combat, intricate quests, and deep lore. Relive the golden age of gaming with this modern homage to 8-bit adventures.
item.content:encoded:
Nox Archaist is a retro-inspired RPG for fans of classic Apple II games. Explore a pixelated fantasy world filled with turn-based combat, intricate quests, and deep lore. Relive the golden age of gaming with this modern homage to 8-bit adventures.

Read more →

item.title: Card Shark
item.description: Card Shark is a thrilling adventure card game set in 18th-century France. Master deceitful card tricks, cheat your way to the top, and unravel a conspiracy in this unique blend of strategy and narrative.
item.content:encoded:
Card Shark is a thrilling adventure card game set in 18th-century France. Master deceitful card tricks, cheat your way to the top, and unravel a conspiracy in this unique blend of strategy and narrative.

Read more →

item.title: Project Pastorate
item.description: Project Pastorate is a gripping RPG-strategy hybrid where you build and lead a medieval parish. Manage resources, guide your flock, and navigate moral dilemmas in this immersive simulation. Will you be a shepherd or a tyrant?
item.content:encoded:
Project Pastorate is a gripping RPG-strategy hybrid where you build and lead a medieval parish. Manage resources, guide your flock, and navigate moral dilemmas in this immersive simulation. Will you be a shepherd or a tyrant?

Read more →

item.title: One Dreamer
item.description: One Dreamer is a heartfelt indie puzzle game where you play as a struggling game developer. Explore the challenges of creativity, mental health, and the gaming industry in this deeply personal narrative experience.
item.content:encoded:
One Dreamer is a heartfelt indie puzzle game where you play as a struggling game developer. Explore the challenges of creativity, mental health, and the gaming industry in this deeply personal narrative experience.

Read more →

item.title: What Lies in the Multiverse
item.description: Explore the multiverse in *What Lies in the Multiverse*, a story-driven puzzle adventure game. Unravel mysteries, switch between alternate realities, and uncover the truth behind a cosmic conspiracy.
item.content:encoded:
Explore the multiverse in *What Lies in the Multiverse*, a story-driven puzzle adventure game. Unravel mysteries, switch between alternate realities, and uncover the truth behind a cosmic conspiracy.

Read more →

item.title: The Plague Doctor of Wippra
item.description: The Plague Doctor of Wippra is a gripping historical horror-survival game. Set in 17th-century Germany, you play as a plague doctor uncovering dark secrets in a cursed village. Can you survive the plague and the unknown horrors lurking in Wippra?
item.content:encoded:
The Plague Doctor of Wippra is a gripping historical horror-survival game. Set in 17th-century Germany, you play as a plague doctor uncovering dark secrets in a cursed village. Can you survive the plague and the unknown horrors lurking in Wippra?

Read more →

item.title: SPACE ACCIDENT
item.description: SPACE ACCIDENT is a thrilling sci-fi roguelike where you survive catastrophic events aboard a procedurally generated spaceship. Repair systems, fight aliens, and escape before time runs out in this intense action-adventure.
item.content:encoded:
SPACE ACCIDENT is a thrilling sci-fi roguelike where you survive catastrophic events aboard a procedurally generated spaceship. Repair systems, fight aliens, and escape before time runs out in this intense action-adventure.

Read more →

item.title: The Outbound Ghost
item.description: The Outbound Ghost is a charming indie RPG where you play as a ghost exploring a mysterious town. Solve puzzles, battle enemies, and uncover the truth behind your afterlife in this pixel art adventure.
item.content:encoded:
The Outbound Ghost is a charming indie RPG where you play as a ghost exploring a mysterious town. Solve puzzles, battle enemies, and uncover the truth behind your afterlife in this pixel art adventure.

Read more →

item.title: Foretales
item.description: Foretales is a narrative-driven card-based adventure game where your choices shape the story. Explore a vibrant fantasy world, forge alliances, and uncover secrets in this unique blend of strategy and storytelling.
item.content:encoded:
Foretales is a narrative-driven card-based adventure game where your choices shape the story. Explore a vibrant fantasy world, forge alliances, and uncover secrets in this unique blend of strategy and storytelling.

Read more →

item.title: Strange Horticulture
item.description: Strange Horticulture is a captivating puzzle-adventure game where you run a mysterious plant shop, uncover occult secrets, and influence a darkly whimsical story. Perfect for fans of narrative-driven mysteries and botanical oddities.
item.content:encoded:
Strange Horticulture is a captivating puzzle-adventure game where you run a mysterious plant shop, uncover occult secrets, and influence a darkly whimsical story. Perfect for fans of narrative-driven mysteries and botanical oddities.

Read more →

item.title: Jack Move
item.description: Jack Move is a gripping cyberpunk RPG blending turn-based combat with a rich narrative. Explore a neon-lit dystopia, uncover dark secrets, and battle corporate overlords in this pixel-perfect adventure.
item.content:encoded:
Jack Move is a gripping cyberpunk RPG blending turn-based combat with a rich narrative. Explore a neon-lit dystopia, uncover dark secrets, and battle corporate overlords in this pixel-perfect adventure.

Read more →

item.title: Scars of Summer
item.description: Scars of Summer is a gripping action-adventure game set in a post-apocalyptic world. Survive, explore, and uncover dark secrets in this emotionally charged narrative experience.
item.content:encoded:
Scars of Summer is a gripping action-adventure game set in a post-apocalyptic world. Survive, explore, and uncover dark secrets in this emotionally charged narrative experience.

Read more →

item.title: Saint Emiliana
item.description: Embark on a mystical journey in *Saint Emiliana*, a fantasy RPG where you uncover ancient secrets, battle dark forces, and shape your destiny. Explore a richly detailed world filled with intrigue and adventure.
item.content:encoded:
Embark on a mystical journey in *Saint Emiliana*, a fantasy RPG where you uncover ancient secrets, battle dark forces, and shape your destiny. Explore a richly detailed world filled with intrigue and adventure.

Read more →

item.title: President Yukino
item.description: In President Yukino, step into the shoes of a political leader navigating a complex world of diplomacy and strategy. This simulation game challenges you to balance power, policies, and public opinion in a gripping role-playing experience.
item.content:encoded:
In President Yukino, step into the shoes of a political leader navigating a complex world of diplomacy and strategy. This simulation game challenges you to balance power, policies, and public opinion in a gripping role-playing experience.

Read more →

item.title: Explorer of Yggdrasil
item.description: Explorer of Yggdrasil is an epic open-world RPG where you traverse the Norse world tree, battling mythical creatures and uncovering ancient secrets. Dive into a rich Viking-inspired adventure with deep lore and dynamic combat.
item.content:encoded:
Explorer of Yggdrasil is an epic open-world RPG where you traverse the Norse world tree, battling mythical creatures and uncovering ancient secrets. Dive into a rich Viking-inspired adventure with deep lore and dynamic combat.

Read more →

item.title: Slave's Sword 2
item.description: Embark on an epic journey in Slave's Sword 2, a gripping action RPG where freedom and vengeance collide. Explore a vast fantasy world, master intense combat, and uncover a deep narrative filled with choices that shape your destiny.
item.content:encoded:
Embark on an epic journey in Slave's Sword 2, a gripping action RPG where freedom and vengeance collide. Explore a vast fantasy world, master intense combat, and uncover a deep narrative filled with choices that shape your destiny.

Read more →

item.title: Slave's Sword
item.description: Slave's Sword is a dark fantasy action RPG where you play as a former slave wielding a cursed blade. Fight for freedom in a brutal world filled with moral choices, intense combat, and a gripping narrative.
item.content:encoded:
Slave's Sword is a dark fantasy action RPG where you play as a former slave wielding a cursed blade. Fight for freedom in a brutal world filled with moral choices, intense combat, and a gripping narrative.

Read more →

item.title: Brave Alchemist Colette
item.description: Brave Alchemist Colette is a captivating RPG where players embark on a magical journey as Colette, a daring alchemist. Explore a vast fantasy world, craft powerful potions, and uncover ancient secrets in this immersive adventure.
item.content:encoded:
Brave Alchemist Colette is a captivating RPG where players embark on a magical journey as Colette, a daring alchemist. Explore a vast fantasy world, craft powerful potions, and uncover ancient secrets in this immersive adventure.

Read more →

item.title: Niplheim's Hunter
item.description: Immerse yourself in Niplheim's Hunter, a captivating RPG fantasy game where strategy meets adult storytelling. Explore a dark, mystical world, battle fearsome creatures, and uncover secrets in this unforgettable adventure.
item.content:encoded:
Immerse yourself in Niplheim's Hunter, a captivating RPG fantasy game where strategy meets adult storytelling. Explore a dark, mystical world, battle fearsome creatures, and uncover secrets in this unforgettable adventure.

Read more →

item.title: Divine Miko Koyori
item.description: Embark on an epic journey in Divine Miko Koyori, an action RPG where you play as a sacred shrine maiden battling dark forces. Explore a mystical world, master divine powers, and uncover a gripping story filled with twists and ancient secrets.
item.content:encoded:
Embark on an epic journey in Divine Miko Koyori, an action RPG where you play as a sacred shrine maiden battling dark forces. Explore a mystical world, master divine powers, and uncover a gripping story filled with twists and ancient secrets.

Read more →

item.title: Ruins Seeker
item.description: Ruins Seeker is an action-adventure RPG where you explore ancient ruins, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden treasures. Dive into a rich world filled with danger and mystery, perfect for fans of exploration and discovery.
item.content:encoded:
Ruins Seeker is an action-adventure RPG where you explore ancient ruins, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden treasures. Dive into a rich world filled with danger and mystery, perfect for fans of exploration and discovery.

Read more →

item.title: Magical Swordmaiden
item.description: Embark on an epic journey in Magical Swordmaiden, a fantasy action-RPG where you wield arcane blades and unravel ancient mysteries. Master spells, forge alliances, and battle dark forces in a richly detailed world.
item.content:encoded:
Embark on an epic journey in Magical Swordmaiden, a fantasy action-RPG where you wield arcane blades and unravel ancient mysteries. Master spells, forge alliances, and battle dark forces in a richly detailed world.

Read more →

item.title: Succubus Affection
item.description: Succubus Affection is a steamy adult visual novel where players romance seductive succubi in a fantasy world. Make choices, build relationships, and uncover dark secrets in this immersive dating sim with multiple endings.
item.content:encoded:
Succubus Affection is a steamy adult visual novel where players romance seductive succubi in a fantasy world. Make choices, build relationships, and uncover dark secrets in this immersive dating sim with multiple endings.

Read more →

item.title: Tear and the Library of Labyrinths
item.description: Embark on a thrilling journey in *Tear and the Library of Labyrinths*, an action-adventure game where you navigate magical labyrinths, solve intricate puzzles, and uncover ancient secrets.
item.content:encoded:
Embark on a thrilling journey in *Tear and the Library of Labyrinths*, an action-adventure game where you navigate magical labyrinths, solve intricate puzzles, and uncover ancient secrets.

Read more →

item.title: Princesses Never Lose!
item.description: Princesses Never Lose! is a charming puzzle-adventure game where you help brave princesses outsmart foes with wit and magic. Solve creative puzzles, explore vibrant kingdoms, and prove that brains beat brawn in this family-friendly fantasy world.
item.content:encoded:
Princesses Never Lose! is a charming puzzle-adventure game where you help brave princesses outsmart foes with wit and magic. Solve creative puzzles, explore vibrant kingdoms, and prove that brains beat brawn in this family-friendly fantasy world.

Read more →

item.title: Succumate
item.description: Succumate is a thrilling survival horror game where players must outwit terrifying creatures in a post-apocalyptic world. Explore, craft, and survive with friends in this immersive multiplayer experience.
item.content:encoded:
Succumate is a thrilling survival horror game where players must outwit terrifying creatures in a post-apocalyptic world. Explore, craft, and survive with friends in this immersive multiplayer experience.

Read more →

item.title: OPUS: Echo of Starsong
item.description: OPUS: Echo of Starsong is a captivating narrative-driven adventure set in a beautifully crafted sci-fi universe. Explore ancient ruins, solve celestial puzzles, and uncover a poignant story of love and destiny in this unique blend of visual novel and exploration gameplay.
item.content:encoded:
OPUS: Echo of Starsong is a captivating narrative-driven adventure set in a beautifully crafted sci-fi universe. Explore ancient ruins, solve celestial puzzles, and uncover a poignant story of love and destiny in this unique blend of visual novel and exploration gameplay.

Read more →

item.title: Necrosmith
item.description: Necrosmith is a unique strategy game where you master necromancy to build an undead army. Explore a vast world, craft powerful minions, and conquer enemies in this dark fantasy sandbox adventure.
item.content:encoded:
Necrosmith is a unique strategy game where you master necromancy to build an undead army. Explore a vast world, craft powerful minions, and conquer enemies in this dark fantasy sandbox adventure.

Read more →

item.title: Wanna Survive
item.description: Wanna Survive is a challenging turn-based strategy game set in a zombie apocalypse. Manage resources, recruit survivors, and outsmart the undead in this tactical survival experience with permadeath mechanics.
item.content:encoded:
Wanna Survive is a challenging turn-based strategy game set in a zombie apocalypse. Manage resources, recruit survivors, and outsmart the undead in this tactical survival experience with permadeath mechanics.

Read more →

item.title: Gore Screaming Show
item.description: Gore Screaming Show is a gripping horror visual novel that plunges players into a dark, psychological mystery. Explore chilling narratives, unravel twisted secrets, and face terrifying choices in this unforgettable experience.
item.content:encoded:
Gore Screaming Show is a gripping horror visual novel that plunges players into a dark, psychological mystery. Explore chilling narratives, unravel twisted secrets, and face terrifying choices in this unforgettable experience.

Read more →

item.title: Myst
item.description: Myst is a groundbreaking first-person adventure puzzle game set on a mysterious island filled with secrets. Explore surreal environments, solve intricate puzzles, and uncover a deep narrative in this classic PC title.
item.content:encoded:
Myst is a groundbreaking first-person adventure puzzle game set on a mysterious island filled with secrets. Explore surreal environments, solve intricate puzzles, and uncover a deep narrative in this classic PC title.

Read more →

item.title: Papetura
item.description: Papetura is a unique handcrafted adventure puzzle game set in a magical paper world. Guide Pape and Tura through stunning environments, solving intricate puzzles in this atmospheric indie gem.
item.content:encoded:
Papetura is a unique handcrafted adventure puzzle game set in a magical paper world. Guide Pape and Tura through stunning environments, solving intricate puzzles in this atmospheric indie gem.

Read more →

item.title: Heaven's Vault
item.description: Heaven's Vault is a captivating narrative adventure game where you play as an archaeologist deciphering ancient inscriptions in a vast sci-fi universe. Uncover lost history and shape your own story.
item.content:encoded:
Heaven's Vault is a captivating narrative adventure game where you play as an archaeologist deciphering ancient inscriptions in a vast sci-fi universe. Uncover lost history and shape your own story.

Read more →

item.title: The Excavation of Hob's Barrow
item.description: The Excavation of Hob's Barrow is a chilling folk horror adventure game where you uncover dark secrets in a Victorian-era village. Explore, solve puzzles, and face supernatural terrors in this pixel-art masterpiece.
item.content:encoded:
The Excavation of Hob's Barrow is a chilling folk horror adventure game where you uncover dark secrets in a Victorian-era village. Explore, solve puzzles, and face supernatural terrors in this pixel-art masterpiece.

Read more →

item.title: Behind the Frame: The Finest Scenery
item.description: Behind the Frame: The Finest Scenery is a heartwarming narrative puzzle adventure where you paint memories to uncover a touching story. Solve artistic puzzles in a cozy, visually stunning world.
item.content:encoded:
Behind the Frame: The Finest Scenery is a heartwarming narrative puzzle adventure where you paint memories to uncover a touching story. Solve artistic puzzles in a cozy, visually stunning world.

Read more →

item.title: TOEM
item.description: Embark on a charming adventure in TOEM, a black-and-white photography puzzle game. Explore whimsical environments, solve mysteries, and capture stunning moments with your camera. Perfect for fans of relaxing indie games.
item.content:encoded:
Embark on a charming adventure in TOEM, a black-and-white photography puzzle game. Explore whimsical environments, solve mysteries, and capture stunning moments with your camera. Perfect for fans of relaxing indie games.

Read more →

item.title: Citizen Sleeper
item.description: Citizen Sleeper is a narrative-driven RPG set in a cyberpunk world where you play as a digitized consciousness in a synthetic body. Survive, uncover secrets, and shape your future on a lawless space station.
item.content:encoded:
Citizen Sleeper is a narrative-driven RPG set in a cyberpunk world where you play as a digitized consciousness in a synthetic body. Survive, uncover secrets, and shape your future on a lawless space station.

Read more →

item.title: Brutal Orchestra
item.description: Brutal Orchestra is a dark fantasy roguelike where you lead a twisted choir through procedurally generated hellscapes. Master turn-based combat, craft haunting melodies, and survive the orchestra of the damned.
item.content:encoded:
Brutal Orchestra is a dark fantasy roguelike where you lead a twisted choir through procedurally generated hellscapes. Master turn-based combat, craft haunting melodies, and survive the orchestra of the damned.

Read more →

item.title: Trap Shrine
item.description: Trap Shrine is a punishing roguelike dungeon crawler where every step could be your last. Navigate procedurally generated shrines filled with deadly traps, cunning enemies, and hidden treasures. Master the art of survival in this high-stakes adventure.
item.content:encoded:
Trap Shrine is a punishing roguelike dungeon crawler where every step could be your last. Navigate procedurally generated shrines filled with deadly traps, cunning enemies, and hidden treasures. Master the art of survival in this high-stakes adventure.

Read more →

item.title: Trap Legend
item.description: Dive into Trap Legend, a fantasy RPG where strategy meets adventure! Craft traps, outsmart enemies, and conquer dungeons in this immersive world. Perfect for fans of tactical gameplay and epic quests.
item.content:encoded:
Dive into Trap Legend, a fantasy RPG where strategy meets adventure! Craft traps, outsmart enemies, and conquer dungeons in this immersive world. Perfect for fans of tactical gameplay and epic quests.

Read more →

item.title: Curious Expedition 2
item.description: Curious Expedition 2 is a thrilling roguelike adventure game set in the late 19th century. Lead expeditions, uncover mysteries, and survive perilous journeys in this strategic exploration gem with procedurally generated worlds.
item.content:encoded:
Curious Expedition 2 is a thrilling roguelike adventure game set in the late 19th century. Lead expeditions, uncover mysteries, and survive perilous journeys in this strategic exploration gem with procedurally generated worlds.

Read more →

item.title: Trap Genesis
item.description: Trap Genesis is a thrilling action-strategy roguelike where you design deadly traps and outsmart enemies in procedurally generated dungeons. Master the art of deception and survival in this unique dungeon crawler experience.
item.content:encoded:
Trap Genesis is a thrilling action-strategy roguelike where you design deadly traps and outsmart enemies in procedurally generated dungeons. Master the art of deception and survival in this unique dungeon crawler experience.

Read more →

item.title: Lonesome Village
item.description: Lonesome Village is a charming adventure-puzzle game where you solve mysteries and rebuild a deserted village. Explore, interact with quirky characters, and uncover secrets in this heartwarming indie gem.
item.content:encoded:
Lonesome Village is a charming adventure-puzzle game where you solve mysteries and rebuild a deserted village. Explore, interact with quirky characters, and uncover secrets in this heartwarming indie gem.

Read more →

item.title: KAPIA
item.description: KAPIA is a captivating sci-fi adventure puzzle game set in a dystopian future. Players unravel mysteries, solve intricate puzzles, and navigate a beautifully crafted world filled with intrigue and danger.
item.content:encoded:
KAPIA is a captivating sci-fi adventure puzzle game set in a dystopian future. Players unravel mysteries, solve intricate puzzles, and navigate a beautifully crafted world filled with intrigue and danger.

Read more →

item.title: Sonority
item.description: Sonority is a captivating musical puzzle-adventure where you solve environmental puzzles using melodies. Explore a mystical world, uncover secrets, and restore harmony through the power of music.
item.content:encoded:
Sonority is a captivating musical puzzle-adventure where you solve environmental puzzles using melodies. Explore a mystical world, uncover secrets, and restore harmony through the power of music.

Read more →

item.title: Magical Girl Celesphonia
item.description: Magical Girl Celesphonia is a captivating RPG where you play as a magical girl battling dark forces in a dystopian world. Explore, fight, and uncover secrets in this anime-style adventure with deep storytelling and strategic combat.
item.content:encoded:
Magical Girl Celesphonia is a captivating RPG where you play as a magical girl battling dark forces in a dystopian world. Explore, fight, and uncover secrets in this anime-style adventure with deep storytelling and strategic combat.

Read more →

item.title: SAMUDRA
item.description: SAMUDRA is a captivating underwater adventure game that blends exploration, puzzle-solving, and narrative storytelling. Dive into a mysterious oceanic world and uncover its secrets.
item.content:encoded:
SAMUDRA is a captivating underwater adventure game that blends exploration, puzzle-solving, and narrative storytelling. Dive into a mysterious oceanic world and uncover its secrets.

Read more →

item.title: Beacon Pines
item.description: Beacon Pines is a captivating narrative adventure game set in a mysterious town. Unravel dark secrets, make pivotal choices, and shape the story in this beautifully crafted indie gem blending mystery and horror elements.
item.content:encoded:
Beacon Pines is a captivating narrative adventure game set in a mysterious town. Unravel dark secrets, make pivotal choices, and shape the story in this beautifully crafted indie gem blending mystery and horror elements.

Read more →

item.title: Kill Fish
item.description: Dive into Kill Fish, a fast-paced underwater arcade shooter where you control a deadly piranha. Swarm, attack, and evolve in this unique aquatic action game with vibrant visuals and addictive gameplay.
item.content:encoded:
Dive into Kill Fish, a fast-paced underwater arcade shooter where you control a deadly piranha. Swarm, attack, and evolve in this unique aquatic action game with vibrant visuals and addictive gameplay.

Read more →

item.title: Cursed to Golf
item.description: Cursed to Golf is a unique roguelike golf adventure where every swing could be your last. Master challenging courses, unlock powerful abilities, and escape the Golf Purgatory in this pixel-perfect indie gem.
item.content:encoded:
Cursed to Golf is a unique roguelike golf adventure where every swing could be your last. Master challenging courses, unlock powerful abilities, and escape the Golf Purgatory in this pixel-perfect indie gem.

Read more →

item.title: BEAUTIFUL DESOLATION
item.description: Explore a post-apocalyptic Africa in BEAUTIFUL DESOLATION, a sci-fi adventure game. Uncover mysteries, interact with factions, and shape your destiny in a hauntingly beautiful world.
item.content:encoded:
Explore a post-apocalyptic Africa in BEAUTIFUL DESOLATION, a sci-fi adventure game. Uncover mysteries, interact with factions, and shape your destiny in a hauntingly beautiful world.

Read more →

item.title: Coromon
item.description: Coromon is a modern monster-taming RPG with strategic turn-based battles, a captivating story, and over 120 unique creatures to collect. Dive into a vibrant pixel-art world filled with challenges and mysteries!
item.content:encoded:
Coromon is a modern monster-taming RPG with strategic turn-based battles, a captivating story, and over 120 unique creatures to collect. Dive into a vibrant pixel-art world filled with challenges and mysteries!

Read more →

item.title: Battle Master
item.description: Battle Master is a strategic turn-based fantasy game where players command armies in epic battles. Build, customize, and lead your forces to victory in a richly detailed world filled with tactical depth.
item.content:encoded:
Battle Master is a strategic turn-based fantasy game where players command armies in epic battles. Build, customize, and lead your forces to victory in a richly detailed world filled with tactical depth.

Read more →

item.title: Paper Cut Mansion
item.description: Paper Cut Mansion is a spooky roguelike adventure where you explore a haunted papercraft mansion. Solve puzzles, battle eerie creatures, and uncover secrets in this procedurally generated horror experience with a unique visual style.
item.content:encoded:
Paper Cut Mansion is a spooky roguelike adventure where you explore a haunted papercraft mansion. Solve puzzles, battle eerie creatures, and uncover secrets in this procedurally generated horror experience with a unique visual style.

Read more →

item.title: Dofamine
item.description: Dofamine is an epic multiplayer RPG set in a vast fantasy world. Explore, battle, and forge alliances in a dynamic open world filled with quests, dungeons, and player-driven events. Dive into Dofamine today!
item.content:encoded:
Dofamine is an epic multiplayer RPG set in a vast fantasy world. Explore, battle, and forge alliances in a dynamic open world filled with quests, dungeons, and player-driven events. Dive into Dofamine today!

Read more →

item.title: Euphoria: Supreme Mechanics
item.description: Euphoria: Supreme Mechanics is a thrilling action-adventure RPG set in a futuristic open world. Master advanced combat, explore vast landscapes, and uncover the secrets of a dystopian society in this immersive sci-fi epic.
item.content:encoded:
Euphoria: Supreme Mechanics is a thrilling action-adventure RPG set in a futuristic open world. Master advanced combat, explore vast landscapes, and uncover the secrets of a dystopian society in this immersive sci-fi epic.

item.title: LEGO® Bricktales
item.description: LEGO® Bricktales is a charming puzzle-adventure game where you build creative LEGO solutions in stunning diorama worlds. Solve physics-based challenges and unlock new skills to help your grandfather restore his amusement park.
item.content:encoded:
LEGO® Bricktales is a charming puzzle-adventure game where you build creative LEGO solutions in stunning diorama worlds. Solve physics-based challenges and unlock new skills to help your grandfather restore his amusement park.

Read more →

item.title: The Case of the Golden Idol
item.description: The Case of the Golden Idol is a gripping mystery puzzle game where you solve intricate murders across the 18th century. Uncover clues, piece together timelines, and unveil a dark conspiracy.
item.content:encoded:
The Case of the Golden Idol is a gripping mystery puzzle game where you solve intricate murders across the 18th century. Uncover clues, piece together timelines, and unveil a dark conspiracy.

Read more →

item.title: Timelie
item.description: Timelie is a unique puzzle-adventure game where you manipulate time to solve stealth-based challenges. Guide a girl and her cat through a surreal world by rewinding, fast-forwarding, and pausing time to outsmart enemies and uncover secrets.
item.content:encoded:
Timelie is a unique puzzle-adventure game where you manipulate time to solve stealth-based challenges. Guide a girl and her cat through a surreal world by rewinding, fast-forwarding, and pausing time to outsmart enemies and uncover secrets.

Read more →

item.title: Prison Princess
item.description: Prison Princess is a captivating visual novel and puzzle adventure game where players guide two princesses through a cursed castle. Solve puzzles, uncover secrets, and unravel the mystery in this anime-inspired fantasy tale.
item.content:encoded:
Prison Princess is a captivating visual novel and puzzle adventure game where players guide two princesses through a cursed castle. Solve puzzles, uncover secrets, and unravel the mystery in this anime-inspired fantasy tale.

Read more →

item.title: KukkoroDays
item.description: KukkoroDays is a heartwarming visual novel romance game where you navigate the joys and challenges of college life. Experience a captivating story filled with charming characters, meaningful choices, and unforgettable moments.
item.content:encoded:
KukkoroDays is a heartwarming visual novel romance game where you navigate the joys and challenges of college life. Experience a captivating story filled with charming characters, meaningful choices, and unforgettable moments.

item.title: IdolDays
item.description: Experience the glamorous yet challenging life of an aspiring idol in IdolDays, a captivating simulation game. Build your career, form bonds, and navigate the highs and lows of stardom in this immersive visual novel adventure.
item.content:encoded:
Experience the glamorous yet challenging life of an aspiring idol in IdolDays, a captivating simulation game. Build your career, form bonds, and navigate the highs and lows of stardom in this immersive visual novel adventure.

item.title: NekoMiko
item.description: NekoMiko is a charming adventure-simulation game where you play as a shrine maiden who can communicate with cats. Explore a mystical world, solve puzzles, and befriend feline spirits in this heartwarming anime-style experience.
item.content:encoded:
NekoMiko is a charming adventure-simulation game where you play as a shrine maiden who can communicate with cats. Explore a mystical world, solve puzzles, and befriend feline spirits in this heartwarming anime-style experience.

item.title: TroubleDays
item.description: TroubleDays is a chilling psychological horror game set in a haunted Japanese convenience store. Survive supernatural encounters, solve eerie puzzles, and uncover dark secrets in this atmospheric indie experience.
item.content:encoded:
TroubleDays is a chilling psychological horror game set in a haunted Japanese convenience store. Survive supernatural encounters, solve eerie puzzles, and uncover dark secrets in this atmospheric indie experience.

item.title: NinNinDays 2
item.description: NinNinDays 2 is a charming anime visual novel where you romance quirky ninja girls in a modern setting. Experience hilarious dating sim antics with multiple endings and beautiful artwork.
item.content:encoded:
NinNinDays 2 is a charming anime visual novel where you romance quirky ninja girls in a modern setting. Experience hilarious dating sim antics with multiple endings and beautiful artwork.

item.title: NinNinDays
item.description: NinNinDays is a charming visual novel that blends romance and comedy with a ninja twist. Join protagonist Souji as he navigates daily life while helping a quirky ninja girl adapt to modern Tokyo. Perfect for anime and slice-of-life fans!
item.content:encoded:
NinNinDays is a charming visual novel that blends romance and comedy with a ninja twist. Join protagonist Souji as he navigates daily life while helping a quirky ninja girl adapt to modern Tokyo. Perfect for anime and slice-of-life fans!

Read more →

item.title: Castaway of the Ardusta Sea
item.description: Castaway of the Ardusta Sea is an immersive survival adventure game where players navigate a vast oceanic world, craft tools, and uncover mysteries. Stranded on uncharted islands, you must survive, explore, and unravel the secrets of the Ardusta Sea.
item.content:encoded:
Castaway of the Ardusta Sea is an immersive survival adventure game where players navigate a vast oceanic world, craft tools, and uncover mysteries. Stranded on uncharted islands, you must survive, explore, and unravel the secrets of the Ardusta Sea.

item.title: Aquamarine
item.description: Dive into Aquamarine, an underwater adventure game where you explore mysterious depths, solve ancient puzzles, and uncover lost secrets. Perfect for fans of exploration and narrative-driven experiences.
item.content:encoded:
Dive into Aquamarine, an underwater adventure game where you explore mysterious depths, solve ancient puzzles, and uncover lost secrets. Perfect for fans of exploration and narrative-driven experiences.

item.title: A YEAR OF SPRINGS
item.description: A YEAR OF SPRINGS is a calming puzzle-driven narrative game where players explore the changing seasons through unique spring-themed challenges. Experience tranquility and storytelling in this indie gem.
item.content:encoded:
A YEAR OF SPRINGS is a calming puzzle-driven narrative game where players explore the changing seasons through unique spring-themed challenges. Experience tranquility and storytelling in this indie gem.

item.title: South of the Circle
item.description: South of the Circle is a cinematic narrative adventure set in the Cold War era. Experience a deeply emotional story of love, survival, and moral dilemmas as you navigate the frozen Antarctic wilderness. Perfect for fans of story-driven games.
item.content:encoded:
South of the Circle is a cinematic narrative adventure set in the Cold War era. Experience a deeply emotional story of love, survival, and moral dilemmas as you navigate the frozen Antarctic wilderness. Perfect for fans of story-driven games.

Read more →

item.title: The Scarlet Demonslayer
item.description: The Scarlet Demonslayer is a gripping action RPG set in a dark fantasy world. Hunt demons, wield ancient weapons, and uncover secrets in a vast open world filled with peril and adventure.
item.content:encoded:
The Scarlet Demonslayer is a gripping action RPG set in a dark fantasy world. Hunt demons, wield ancient weapons, and uncover secrets in a vast open world filled with peril and adventure.

item.title: Titan Station
item.description: Explore the sprawling metropolis of Titan Station, a sci-fi RPG blending action-packed combat, deep storytelling, and an open-world adventure. Uncover secrets, forge alliances, and shape your destiny in this epic interstellar journey.
item.content:encoded:
Explore the sprawling metropolis of Titan Station, a sci-fi RPG blending action-packed combat, deep storytelling, and an open-world adventure. Uncover secrets, forge alliances, and shape your destiny in this epic interstellar journey.

item.title: qomp
item.description: qomp is a minimalist arcade action game where you control a Pong ball escaping its classic confines. Navigate perilous obstacles with simple two-button controls in this stylish, challenging twist on retro gaming.
item.content:encoded:
qomp is a minimalist arcade action game where you control a Pong ball escaping its classic confines. Navigate perilous obstacles with simple two-button controls in this stylish, challenging twist on retro gaming.

item.title: Broken Pieces
item.description: Broken Pieces is a gripping psychological horror adventure set in a mysterious coastal town. Solve puzzles, uncover dark secrets, and survive eerie encounters in this narrative-driven mystery game with a haunting atmosphere.
item.content:encoded:
Broken Pieces is a gripping psychological horror adventure set in a mysterious coastal town. Solve puzzles, uncover dark secrets, and survive eerie encounters in this narrative-driven mystery game with a haunting atmosphere.

item.title: Hero of the Kingdom II
item.description: Hero of the Kingdom II is a captivating RPG adventure game that immerses players in a medieval fantasy world. Explore, solve quests, and build your skills to restore peace to the kingdom.
item.content:encoded:
Hero of the Kingdom II is a captivating RPG adventure game that immerses players in a medieval fantasy world. Explore, solve quests, and build your skills to restore peace to the kingdom.

item.description: Hero of the Kingdom: The Lost Tales 1 is a captivating adventure-puzzle game where players embark on a quest to restore peace to a troubled kingdom. Solve challenging puzzles, gather resources, and uncover hidden secrets in this immersive fantasy world.
item.content:encoded:
Hero of the Kingdom: The Lost Tales 1 is a captivating adventure-puzzle game where players embark on a quest to restore peace to a troubled kingdom. Solve challenging puzzles, gather resources, and uncover hidden secrets in this immersive fantasy world.

item.title: Hero of the Kingdom
item.description: Hero of the Kingdom is a captivating adventure RPG where you rebuild a ravaged land, rescue your family, and battle dark forces. Explore, craft, and strategize in this immersive fantasy world.

Hero of the Kingdom is a captivating adventure RPG where you rebuild a ravaged land, rescue your family, and battle dark forces. Explore, craft, and strategize in this immersive fantasy world.

item.title: Togainu no Chi ~Lost Blood~
item.description: Togainu no Chi ~Lost Blood~ is a gripping BL visual novel set in a dystopian Tokyo. Players navigate a deadly game of survival, forging alliances and unraveling dark secrets in this intense psychological thriller.
item.content:encoded:
Togainu no Chi ~Lost Blood~ is a gripping BL visual novel set in a dystopian Tokyo. Players navigate a deadly game of survival, forging alliances and unraveling dark secrets in this intense psychological thriller.

item.title: Hero of the Kingdom III
item.description: Hero of the Kingdom III is a captivating adventure RPG where you rebuild a shattered kingdom, battle foes, and uncover secrets. Explore, craft, and strategize in this immersive fantasy world.
item.content:encoded:
Hero of the Kingdom III is a captivating adventure RPG where you rebuild a shattered kingdom, battle foes, and uncover secrets. Explore, craft, and strategize in this immersive fantasy world.

item.title: Lucy Dreaming
item.description: Lucy Dreaming is a darkly comedic point-and-click adventure where you explore dreams, solve puzzles, and uncover secrets. Play as Lucy, a girl who must conquer her nightmares to escape a sleepwalking curse in her quirky English village.
item.content:encoded:
Lucy Dreaming is a darkly comedic point-and-click adventure where you explore dreams, solve puzzles, and uncover secrets. Play as Lucy, a girl who must conquer her nightmares to escape a sleepwalking curse in her quirky English village.

Read more →

item.title: How to Say Goodbye
item.description: How to Say Goodbye is a heartfelt puzzle-adventure game about navigating grief and letting go. Guide lost spirits through beautifully crafted dioramas to help them find peace in this touching narrative experience.
item.content:encoded:
How to Say Goodbye is a heartfelt puzzle-adventure game about navigating grief and letting go. Guide lost spirits through beautifully crafted dioramas to help them find peace in this touching narrative experience.

Read more →

item.title: Attentat 1942
item.description: Attentat 1942 is a gripping historical adventure game set in WWII Czechoslovakia. Experience the war through survivor testimonies, interactive storytelling, and moral dilemmas in this award-winning narrative.
item.content:encoded:
Attentat 1942 is a gripping historical adventure game set in WWII Czechoslovakia. Experience the war through survivor testimonies, interactive storytelling, and moral dilemmas in this award-winning narrative.

Read more →

item.title: Weird Worlds: Return to Infinite Space
item.description: Weird Worlds: Return to Infinite Space is a sci-fi roguelike adventure game where you explore a vast galaxy, encounter strange aliens, and uncover cosmic mysteries. Dive into a procedurally generated universe filled with danger and discovery.
item.content:encoded:
Weird Worlds: Return to Infinite Space is a sci-fi roguelike adventure game where you explore a vast galaxy, encounter strange aliens, and uncover cosmic mysteries. Dive into a procedurally generated universe filled with danger and discovery.

item.title: Beyond The Edge Of Owlsgard
item.description: Beyond The Edge Of Owlsgard is a captivating story-driven adventure game set in a mystical fantasy world. Embark on a quest filled with exploration, puzzles, and rich lore as you uncover the secrets of Owlsgard.
item.content:encoded:
Beyond The Edge Of Owlsgard is a captivating story-driven adventure game set in a mystical fantasy world. Embark on a quest filled with exploration, puzzles, and rich lore as you uncover the secrets of Owlsgard.

item.title: Into the Nightmare
item.description: Into the Nightmare is a gripping psychological horror game where players must survive a surreal, ever-changing nightmare. Uncover chilling secrets, face terrifying enemies, and escape the darkness in this intense survival adventure.
item.content:encoded:
Into the Nightmare is a gripping psychological horror game where players must survive a surreal, ever-changing nightmare. Uncover chilling secrets, face terrifying enemies, and escape the darkness in this intense survival adventure.

item.title: 7 Girls War
item.description: 7 Girls War is a tactical JRPG with visual novel elements, following seven heroines in a battle for survival. Experience deep strategy, rich storytelling, and stunning anime-style visuals in this unique blend of genres.
item.content:encoded:
7 Girls War is a tactical JRPG with visual novel elements, following seven heroines in a battle for survival. Experience deep strategy, rich storytelling, and stunning anime-style visuals in this unique blend of genres.

Read more →

item.title: Sengoku Rance
item.description: Sengoku Rance is a unique blend of turn-based strategy and adult visual novel set in feudal Japan. Lead Rance on a conquest to unite the warring states with tactical battles, quirky humor, and mature content.
item.content:encoded:
Sengoku Rance is a unique blend of turn-based strategy and adult visual novel set in feudal Japan. Lead Rance on a conquest to unite the warring states with tactical battles, quirky humor, and mature content.

Read more →

item.title: Boxville
item.description: Boxville is a charming indie adventure puzzle game set in a bustling cardboard city. Solve creative puzzles, uncover hidden secrets, and explore a whimsical world crafted entirely from recycled materials. Perfect for fans of story-driven experiences.
item.content:encoded:
Boxville is a charming indie adventure puzzle game set in a bustling cardboard city. Solve creative puzzles, uncover hidden secrets, and explore a whimsical world crafted entirely from recycled materials. Perfect for fans of story-driven experiences.

Read more →
